title: Gilded Neon UI
description: A dark-ish GUI retexture, inspried by the high contrast pack with a lot more added features.
body:
# What is it?
Gilded Neon UI is a dark themed GUI resourcepack. This pack was inspired by the high contrast pack that was recently added to the game. I wanted to add my own twist to it by recolouring the buttons, which then eventually evolved into a full pack.

## Compatability
- This pack has official compatibility with ModMenu and RecursiveResources. 
- This pack uses core shaders to change some otherwise uneditable gui elements, e.g: textboxes and tooltips. These are not required for the pack to function meaning it should be compatible with any other packs that use core shaders.
